issues.description: Condition should be 'TrashCount' (checking rested cards) not 'HasRestingDon'. HasRestingDon checks for attached DON!!, not rested cards on board.
Missing final action: 'set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active' should be Rest action (or equivalent to set DON as active). Current DSL only has DrawCard and TrashFromHand.
